## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce N-Able team to GrowthX's AI-powered content strategy capabilities and explore potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [N-Able is pivoting from IT management to cybersecurity, targeting mid-market companies (250-2,500 employees)](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint to develop comprehensive content strategies using AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [N-Able seeks to improve organic traffic, keyword rankings, and full-funnel marketing campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [A follow-up deep dive meeting is scheduled for Monday at 3:30 PM ET / 1:30 PM PT to discuss potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)

## Topics

### N-Able's Business Overview and Goals

  - [$500M revenue public company, spun off from SolarWinds](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Pivoting from IT management to cybersecurity](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Targeting mid-market (250-2,500 employees) through channel-led motion](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Aiming to grow from $500M to $750M revenue by 2028](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Seeking to improve digital demand generation and full-funnel marketing campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Strategy

  - [8-week strategy sprint to develop comprehensive content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows for research, content creation, fact-checking, and illustration](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Custom-built content OS for efficient content planning and management](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Weekly meetings to share results and tweak strategy](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Emphasis on deep dives and becoming an extension of the client's team](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

### Current Marketing Challenges for N-Able

  - [Heavy reliance on paid search and social media](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Lack of full-funnel marketing campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Need to refresh messaging for new cybersecurity focus](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Desire to improve organic traffic and keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

### Next Steps for Potential Collaboration

  - [Deep dive meeting scheduled for Monday (3:30 PM ET / 1:30 PM PT)](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [N-Able to involve SEO team in the discussion](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Evaluate potential value and ROI of GrowthX engagement](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [Consider reallocating budget from paid search/social to content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Hold deep dive meeting on Monday with N-Able's SEO team and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [GrowthX to send calendar invite and include additional N-Able team members](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)
  - [N-Able to evaluate potential budget reallocation for GrowthX engagement](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [Discuss specific goals, timelines, and success metrics for potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/P_4331PpyKyq2xy_rr9TwJEk-woQMgzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
